DAAPro Direct Anterior THR Leg Positioning System

DAAPro · Positioning Systems

Meril's Nailing System is a professional-grade trauma implant system. Key features include: Cannulated - 4.7mm. Clinical applications: In the event of ipsilateral femoral neck fractures, the three proximal recon screws with a 12° anteversion provide extra stability.

CDSCO Validated Data
Frequently Asked Questions

Leg positioning system designed for Direct Anterior Approach Total Hip Replacement. Enables all essential leg movements for anterior THR in a condensed and efficient manner. Features up to 180-degree rotation, 130mm traction, full extension, and 40-degree adduction/abduction. Fast Track Hybrid System provides simultaneous traction and rotation. Combines with any standard OR table. Quick OR setup, staff-friendly operation, and small 2x3ft footprint.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the DAAPro Direct Anterior THR Leg Positioning System, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The DAAPro Direct Anterior THR Leg Positioning System is constructed using Medical Grade Device, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
